name: compute_cap_rate_valuation
description: Compute implied property value from NOI and cap rate, with a sensitivity table at ±50bps increments. Use this to validate cap rate recommendations and show value impact.

annual_noi.description: Annual net operating income in dollars

purchase_price.description: Optional: purchase price to compute spread

sensitivity_steps.description: Number of ±50bps steps in sensitivity table (default 4)
